papers.title_en: A multimodal deepsurv approach: integrating radiomics and clinical factors for brain metastasis survival prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑转移瘤（BM）患者生存预测的临床难题，提出了一种结合影像组学特征与临床因素的多模态 DeepSurv 深度学习模型。通过整合非侵入性的影像数据与患者临床指标，该方法旨在提供更精准的预后评估，从而辅助医生制定个性化治疗策略。研究证明了多模态数据融合在提升生存预测性能方面的潜力，为脑转移瘤的精准医疗提供了重要的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose Predicting survival outcomes for brain metastasis (BM) patients is crucial fortailoring treatment strategies and improving patient management. Radiomics anddeep learning (DL) approaches offer potential for non-invasive survival predictions …

papers.title_en: Toward a Biopsy-Free Diagnosis of Prostate Cancer: Potential of Combined 18F-Flotufolastat PSMA PET and mpMRI
papers.tldr: 本研究通过回顾性分析，评估了 18F-flotufolastat PSMA PET 与多参数核磁共振（mpMRI）联合成像在检测临床显著性前列腺癌（csPCa）中的诊断效能。研究旨在探索一种非侵入性的诊断方案，以减少对传统活检的依赖。结果表明该联合技术具有极高的诊断潜力，为未来实现前列腺癌的“无活检”精准诊断提供了重要依据。
papers.abstract_en: This retrospective analysis aimed to evaluate the diagnostic performance of 18 F-flotufolastat PET/MRI for the detection of clinically significant prostate cancer(csPCa). The primary objective of the study was to assess the proportion of patients …

papers.title_en: EHD-Net: A Hybrid Approach to Brain Tumor Segmentation in MRI Using U-Net Transformer Architecture with Double Attention
papers.tldr: 本研究针对MRI脑肿瘤分割的挑战，提出了EHD-Net混合网络。该架构巧妙结合了U-Net的结构优势与Transformer捕捉长程依赖的能力，并引入双重注意力机制以增强特征表示。实验表明，该方法在提高分割精度的同时保持了计算效率，为临床诊断和治疗规划提供了强有力的技术支持，是医学图像处理领域的一项重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate segmentation of brain tumors from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)plays a crucial role in diagnosis, treatment planning, and follow-up. EHD-Net(Efficient Hybrid Double-Attention Network) is proposed as a hybrid architecture that …

papers.title_en: MedBench: Deliberative Evaluation of Medical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了MedBench，这是一个旨在将医疗语言模型作为“审慎智能体”而非简单预测器进行评估的新型基准。该基准整合了来自6个医疗问答数据集的19,625个问题，对8个参数规模在4B至32B之间的主流模型进行了深入测试。MedBench通过强调模型的审慎推理能力，为医疗AI在复杂临床决策场景下的表现提供了更全面、更严谨的评价体系，是医疗大模型评估领域的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce MedBench, a benchmark for evaluating medical language models asdeliberating agents rather than isolated predictors. MedBench evaluates eightmodels (4B? 32B) on 19,625 questions from six medical QA datasets using …

papers.title_en: Dual-Latent Memory Routing for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在长文本生成过程中容易丢失早期视觉证据的问题，提出了双潜变量记忆路由（Dual-Latent Memory Routing）机制。该方法通过优化视觉信息的存储与检索路径，增强了模型在复杂视觉语言推理任务中的上下文保持能力，有效缓解了长序列生成时的性能衰减，显著提升了推理的准确性与连贯性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently made strong progress invision-language reasoning, yet their performance often degrades as generationsgrow longer. A key factor is that they frequently lose track of earlier visual evidence …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型在异构数据上训练时难以兼顾收敛速度与领域覆盖的问题，提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束梯度匹配的小批量选择方法。该方法通过在各领域约束下选择能最有效模拟全局梯度的样本子集，实现了训练效率与数据多样性的平衡，为优化大规模异构数据的训练过程提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: PolyAudio: Advancing Multi-Audio Reasoning in Large Audio Language Models with Interleaved Multi-Audio Contexts
papers.tldr: PolyAudio 针对现有大音频语言模型在处理交错多音频上下文推理方面的局限性，提出了一种全新的模型架构。该研究通过引入交错的多音频上下文学习，使模型能够理解并推理多个音频片段之间的复杂关系。PolyAudio 在多音频任务中表现出色，显著提升了模型在复杂音频场景下的交互与分析能力，为音频语言模型的研究开辟了新方向。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Large Audio Language Models have shown impressive performance onsingle-clip audio language tasks such as automatic speech recognition, captioning,and sound event recognition. Yet, their ability to reason over interleaved multi-audio …

papers.title_en: Scene Graph Thinking: Reinforcing Structured Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理复杂视觉场景时忽视物体间结构化关系的问题，提出了“场景图思维”（Scene Graph Thinking）。该方法通过引入场景图来增强模型的结构化视觉推理能力，弥补了现有模型仅关注孤立物体的不足。实验表明，该方法在目标导航等需要高效空间理解的任务中表现优异，显著提升了模型的感知与推理深度，为构建更具逻辑性的多模态智能体提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong perceptionand reasoning capabilities. However, most existing models focus on isolated objectsand neglect structured relationships for efficient target navigation, limiting their …

papers.title_en: Exploiting Tree Structure for Credit Assignment in Reinforcement Learning with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在强化学习推理任务中面临的稀疏和延迟奖励问题，提出了利用树状结构进行令牌级信用分配的方法。通过分析推理路径的树形特征，该方法能够更精准地识别对最终结果有贡献的关键步骤，有效解决了长链推理中的信用分配难题，显著提升了模型在复杂任务中的学习效率与推理性能。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning has shown strong promise for strengthening the reasoningability of large language models (LLMs), but sparse, delayed rewards over longchains make token-level credit assignment a central challenge. Actor–critic methods …

papers.title_en: Radiomics-based intratumoral heterogeneity subtypes in IDH wild-type glioblastoma with pathomic and transcriptomic association analyses: a multicenter study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤（IDH-wt GBM）显著的瘤内异质性问题，开展了一项多中心研究。通过整合影像组学技术，研究团队成功识别出不同的肿瘤异质性亚型，并进一步通过病理组学和转录组学分析揭示了这些亚型在分子和细胞水平上的差异。该研究不仅为理解GBM的复杂性提供了新视角，还为临床预后评估和个体化治疗方案的制定提供了重要的影像学标志物。
papers.abstract_en: Background IDH wild-type glioblastoma (IDH-wt GBM) exhibits substantialintratumoral heterogeneity, which contributes to treatment resistance, diseaserecurrence, and variable clinical outcomes. This study aimed to identify radiomics …

papers.title_en: Multimodal learning for early hypertension burden detection using OCT angiography and electronic medical records
papers.tldr: 本研究开发了一种结合光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCT-A）与电子病历（EMR）的多模态学习方法，用于早期检测高血压负担及全身靶器官损害。通过整合视网膜微血管影像与临床数据，该模型能够更精准地识别高血压相关的病理变化，为高血压的早期筛查和风险评估提供了创新的自动化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Hypertensive retinopathy serves as a critical indicator of systemic target organdamage (TOD). This study aims to develop and evaluate a multimodal learningmethod utilizing optical coherence tomography angiography (OCT-A) and electronic …

papers.title_en: Machine learning models using 18F-FDG PET/CT radiomics for RAS mutation prediction and prognostic stratification in colorectal cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在利用18F-FDG PET/CT影像组学特征，结合先进的机器学习模型（如扩散语言模型）来预测结直肠癌中的RAS基因突变并进行预后分层。研究探讨了通过双向去噪技术构建的医疗基础模型在处理医学影像数据中的潜力，旨在为结直肠癌患者提供一种无创且精准的基因检测与风险评估手段。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Lifelong learning enabled GAN framework for brain MRI FLAIR synthesis and tumor segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床中MRI模态缺失（如FLAIR）的问题，提出了一种基于终身学习的GAN框架。该框架能够从现有模态合成缺失的FLAIR序列，并同步进行脑肿瘤分割。通过引入终身学习机制，模型能够在处理新数据时保持旧知识，有效解决了多模态神经影像分析中的数据不完整挑战，提升了诊断的准确性和鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate synthesis of missing MRI modalities plays a crucial role in multi-modalneuro-imaging pipelines. In real-world setups, each hospital or scanner does notalways provide all MRI modalities for diagnosis. As FLAIR MRI sequence shows …

papers.title_en: Co-assistant networks by pathology foundation model and convolutional neural network for gigapixel whole slide image analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究针对超大像素全切片图像（WSI）分析，提出了一种协同辅助网络。该方法结合了病理基础模型与卷积神经网络（CNN），在多实例学习（MIL）框架下提取补丁级特征。通过融合基础模型的全局表征能力与CNN的局部特征提取优势，有效解决了传统方法在处理复杂病理图像时的局限性，显著提升了WSI分类与分析的准确性，为高效、精准的数字化病理诊断提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multiple instance learning (MIL) with pre-trained models to extract patch-levelfeatures has been widely used in whole slide image (WSI) analysis to avoidexpensive pixel-level annotations. Although pre-trained pathology foundation model …

papers.title_en: Teach-to-Reason: Competition-Guided Reasoning with a Self-Improving Teacher
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线视觉问答（CXR VQA）中模型缺乏可靠医学推理的问题，提出了“Teach-to-Reason”框架。该方法通过引入具有自我改进能力的教师模型，并利用竞争引导机制来优化推理过程，不仅提高了答案的准确性，还显著增强了模型生成医疗逻辑的可靠性，为医疗AI的可解释性提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-ray visual question answering (CXR VQA) requires models not only topredict correct answers, but also to produce reliable medical reasoning. However,existing reinforcement-learning-based training typically relies on answer-level …

papers.title_en: MultiHashFormer: Hash-based Generative Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对生成式语言模型中嵌入矩阵随词表规模线性增长导致的参数冗余问题，提出了 MultiHashFormer。该模型通过多重哈希机制将词项映射至共享向量空间，旨在显著降低嵌入层的参数足迹。实验证明，该方法在大幅压缩模型体积的同时，仍能保持与传统模型相当的生成性能，为在大规模词表环境下构建轻量化生成式模型提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Language models (LMs) represent tokens using embedding matrices that scalelinearly with the vocabulary size. To constrain the parameter footprint, prior workproposes hashing many tokens into a single vector within encoder-only models …

papers.title_en: EchoSonar-R: A Multi-View Reasoning-Enabled Model for Disease Classification and Report Generation in Echocardiography
papers.tldr: 超声心动图是诊断心血管疾病的关键手段，但其解释需要综合多个视图的互补信息。本文提出了 EchoSonar-R，这是一种具备多视图推理能力的模型，专门用于超声心动图的疾病分类和报告生成。该模型通过整合不同切面的视觉特征，模拟医生的临床推理过程，显著提升了诊断的准确性和报告的专业性，为自动化心脏影像分析提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Echocardiography is the most widely used non-invasive cardiac imaging modality,providing essential information for cardiovascular diagnosis. Interpreting anechocardiogram requires synthesizing complementary evidence across multiple …

papers.title_en: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了离散扩散语言模型在放射科报告交互式起草中的应用。针对传统自回归模型在非线性文本编辑方面的不足，研究利用扩散模型的双向去噪特性，实现了更灵活的报告生成。该方法不仅在生成质量上达到了领先水平，还显著提升了交互式起草的效率，为医疗基础模型的发展提供了新方向。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Procedural Memory Distillation: Online Reflection for Self-Improving Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出程序记忆蒸馏（PMD）方法，旨在解决现有强化学习（RLVR）仅依赖回合级奖励而忽略推理过程信息的问题。通过在线反思机制，模型能够从自身的推理路径中提取丰富的程序化知识并进行自我蒸馏。该方法显著提升了语言模型在复杂任务中的自我进化能力，为实现更高效的自主学习提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), along with recentselfdistillation variants such as SDPO, evaluates each rollout against a verifier andupdates the policy from that episode-level signal. However, the richer procedural …

papers.title_en: Towards Real-World Ultrasound Understanding: Large Vision-Language Models from Multi-Image Examinations with Long-Form Reports
papers.tldr: 本研究针对超声影像在临床应用中存在的复杂性与多图变异性，提出了一种新型多模态大语言模型。该模型突破了以往单图分析的局限，能够处理包含多张图像的完整超声检查序列，并结合长篇临床报告进行深度理解。通过在真实世界数据集上的训练与验证，该方法显著提升了模型对超声检查的自动化分析与报告生成能力，为超声领域的智能辅助诊断提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved strong performance acrossmany medical imaging tasks, yet their application to ultrasound remains limited dueto its inherent complexity and variability. In this work, we revisit what is truly needed …

papers.title_en: Patient-Specific Articulated Digital Twins from a Single Full-Body CT Scan
papers.tldr: 本研究针对传统CT解剖模型仅能呈现静态扫描姿态的局限性，提出了一种从单次全身CT扫描中构建患者特异性关节化数字孪生的方法。该方法通过对静态数据进行参数化建模，实现了可活动的个体化解剖模型，为手术规划、影像引导干预及算法开发提供了更具动态性和个体化的参考框架，显著提升了医学模拟的实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Patient-specific anatomical models provide individualized context for surgicalplanning, image-guided intervention, and algorithm development. However, most CT-derived models are static: they preserve the body configuration captured at scan …

papers.title_en: RadiomicNet: A Hybrid Radiomics-Guided Lightweight Architecture for Interpretable Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对深度学习在医学图像分割中存在的数学难解释性、参数量大及缺乏临床可解释性等问题，本文提出了RadiomicNet。这是一种结合了影像组学特征的混合轻量化架构，通过将传统影像组学特征融入深度学习网络，在保持高性能的同时，显著降低了模型复杂度并增强了分割结果的临床可解释性，为医疗AI应用提供了更透明且高效的方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning has achieved remarkable performance in medical imagesegmentation, yet it suffers from critical limitations: mathematical intractability,substantial parameter requirements, and lack of clinical interpretability. We propose …
